title: roucela erinus
intro: Roucela erinus, also known as the sweet- Alison, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Roucela erinus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Roucela erinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
